observations.summary: Aviel embodies the archetype of one who cannot let go of grief, holding tightly to every remnant of what was lost, creating a suffocating emotional state.

evidence.quote: Others keep every thread, every cracked vessel, every scrap of parchment with nothing written on it, and pull it tighter and tighter until there is no room left to breathe. Aviel was one of those.

observations.summary: Aviel's son is moving through darkness to undo his father's suffocating grip on grief, suggesting a movement towards healing and liberation.

evidence.quote: it is exactly what his son was creeping through the dark to undo.
